prompt:
Transform the uploaded BMW into a premium Transformers-style giant robot while preserving 100% of the original vehicle identity and all visible details. Maintain the exact original BMW paint color, metallic finish, BMW badges, model branding, kidney grille design, headlights, taillights, alloy wheels, mirrors, windows, roofline, body kit, stickers, accessories, and every modification exactly as shown in the uploaded image. Do not include any registration number plate on either the vehicle or the robot.

Create a massive futuristic Transformer robot constructed entirely from authentic BMW vehicle components. The robot must clearly resemble the same BMW, with recognizable hood panels forming the chest, headlights integrated into the shoulders, doors transformed into armored limbs, wheels positioned naturally on the shoulders and legs, kidney grille and BMW emblem prominently displayed, and original body panels seamlessly converted into advanced mechanical armor. Preserve the exact color scheme on both the vehicle and robot. No number plate should be visible anywhere.

Composition: Hero-shot automotive advertisement. The real BMW is parked in the foreground while its towering Transformer form stands directly behind it in a powerful battle-ready stance. The robot should appear 30–50 feet tall, dominating the scene while remaining visually connected to the original vehicle.

Environment: Dark cinematic studio environment with deep black background, electric blue energy field, blue gradient lighting, volumetric fog, atmospheric smoke, floating sparks, glowing particles, energy arcs, and futuristic mechanical ambience. Massive glowing BMW roundel emblem integrated into the blue energy field behind the robot.

Ultra-detailed mechanical engineering with exposed pistons, gears, hydraulic systems, servo motors, armor plating, cybernetic components, illuminated circuitry, dark chrome metal surfaces, brushed steel textures, and glowing blue robotic eyes. Luxury automotive commercial styling with photorealistic materials and engineering precision.

Lighting: HDR cinematic lighting, dramatic rim light, powerful backlight, ray-traced reflections, realistic shadow depth, blue energy glow reflections across metal surfaces, studio-grade automotive lighting, Unreal Engine 5 quality, Octane Render, hyper-realistic CGI.

Floor: Wet reflective black floor with realistic mirror reflections of both the BMW and its Transformer form.

Camera: Low-angle hero perspective, dramatic movie-poster composition, ultra-wide cinematic framing, strong depth, premium luxury advertisement look, ultra-sharp focus.

Style Tags: Transformers movie aesthetic, luxury automotive campaign, premium concept art, photorealistic CGI, cinematic science-fiction, award-winning vehicle design, mechanical masterpiece, ultra-detailed engineering, futuristic robot, high-end commercial photography, 8K, masterpiece quality.

Aspect Ratio: 9:16 vertical (1080×1920 or 1440×25
